title: Heart's Desire
writer: Roger Burford, Jack Davies, Bruno Frank
actors: Richard Tauber, Leonora Corbett, Carl Harbord
plot: An impresario's sister touring Europe discovers the talent of a popular Viennese singer and persuades him to sign an operatic contract in England, reluctant as he is to leave his homeland. Beautifully sung music in a well done Bri...
